2025461138067259864.full_text:
Forget the India vs. Pakistan hype—if you want elite cricket, India vs. South Africa is the real main event. The stats prove it’s the ultimate clash of titans:

- Since 2024, India is a perfect 12-0, while South Africa has only lost once in 13 matches.

- That single South African loss? It was against India in the 2024 final.

- While Ind vs. Pak often feels one-sided and flat, this rivalry delivers two structured, consistent sides operating at the highest level of the game. 

- It’s not just a match; it’s the only true test of quality in the T20 World Cup.

2025459683876602221.full_text:
#OnThisDay in 1992

𝗦𝗮𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗻 𝗧𝗲𝗻𝗱𝘂𝗹𝗸𝗮𝗿 made his Worldcup Debut at the age of (18yr 304d)💥

Sachin In Worldcup

- Most Runs (2278)
- 2nd Most 100s (6)
- Most 50s (15)
- Most 4s (241)
- Most P.O.M (9)
- Most Top Scores (18)
- Most Top Scores for India in WC Series (6 in 2003)
- 2nd Most Runs in a series (673)
- 2nd Most 50+ scores in a series (7)
- Youngest to play for India in WC
- Youngest to Pick Wicket for India in WC
- Youngest to Win P.O.M Award 
- Most 50+ Scores for India in WC Knockouts (4)
- 1st to Score 500 Runs in a Series (1996)
- 1st to Score 600 Runs in a Series (2003)
- Top RunScorer In 1996 & 2003WC
- Only player to Win Multiple P.O.M Awards Before 20 Age
- Only Indian to Score 50 runs & Pick atleast 1 wicket in a WC match for (5 times)
- Only player to Score 50 runs & Pick atleast 2 wickets in a WC Knockout match for (2 times)
- 1st Indian to Score Half Century in Powerplay 
- Only Indian to Win 3 P.O.M Awards against an Opponent in Worldcup (vs Pak)
